name: Triple Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup small curd cottage cheese, creamed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Mix the cheeses and spread in the plate.
4. Beat eggs, milk, and baking mix together until smooth. Use a blender for 15 seconds on high or an electric mixer for 1 minute on high.
5. Pour the batter into the plate and sprinkle with onions.
6. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 40-45 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
